abilities.description:
When you make a combat move using the weapon, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit. When you score a miss as a result, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price} by choosing one.

  • Volatile: @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} (1 harm)
  • Fragile: Mark the weapon as broken
When you make a move by using the weapon, you may reroll one challenge die.
When you score a miss on a combat move with the weapon, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price} as normal.

When you make a combat move using the weapon, you may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-3) to choose one (after rolling).

  • Overcharged: Mark progress on a hit
  • Focused: Improve a miss to a weak hit, or a weak hit to a strong hit.
